verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Love is not proud Love does not boast Love after all Matters the most

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Love does not run Love does not hide Love does not keep Locked inside

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Love is the river that flows through Love never fails you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Love will sustain Love will provide Love will not cease At the end of time

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Love will protect Love always hopes Love still believes When you don't

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Love is the arms that are holding you Love never fails you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: When my heart won't make a sound When I can't turn back around When the sky is falling down Nothing is greater than this Greater than this

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Love is right here Love is alive Love is the way The truth the life

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Love is the river that flows through Love is the arms that are holding you Love is the place you will fly to Love never fails you
